6021.issue: [W6021] `## License` is not the last section in [README.md](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.lorawan/blob/master/README.md). The license section should be the last section.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.lorawan/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
